author: design-phase-1a-reactive--695956
content:
Plan: Implementing vitreous_reactive crate — signal-based reactivity system with zero external dependencies.

Architecture:
- Custom SlotMap for arena storage (no external slotmap crate)
- Thread-local Runtime with RefCell — short borrows only, never held across user code
- Push-pull hybrid: staleness pushed eagerly, values pulled lazily on memo read
- Pre-check optimization: before running queued effects, recompute stale memo sources and skip if unchanged (satisfies AC-3 PartialEq filtering)
- changed_in_cycle flag on memos for multi-effect correctness

File plan:
1. runtime.rs — SlotMap, ID newtypes, slot types, Runtime struct, thread_local, tracking helpers
2. graph.rs — clean_observer_sources, mark_stale, notify_signal_subscribers
3. signal.rs — Signal<T>, ReadSignal<T>, create_signal
4. memo.rs — Memo<T>, create_memo, recompute_memo
5. effect.rs — Effect, create_effect, run_effect
6. batch.rs — batch(), flush_effects() with should_run_effect pre-check
7. scope.rs — Scope, create_scope, dispose on Drop
8. context.rs — provide_context, use_context, try_use_context (stored per scope, walk parent chain)
9. resource.rs — Resource<S,T>, create_resource, set_executor (pluggable async)
10. lib.rs — public API re-exports + tests

Key design decisions:
- All public handles (Signal, Memo, Effect) are Copy, !Send, !Sync via PhantomData<*const T>
- Closures stored as Rc<dyn Fn()> for clonability across borrow boundaries
- Scope context stored on ScopeSlot, looked up by walking parent chain
- Resource cancellation via Rc<Cell<u64>> generation counter
